docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GARZINI, ALYSSE
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT GARZINI RE: REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED ONLY. INFORM OF $10 FEE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GARZINI, ALYSSE
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-27-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-08-2003 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CORRESPONDENCE BY DEFT GARZINI FILED. RE: REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE TO FOLDER. REQUEST UNTIMELY; $10 FEE NOT ENCLOSED. JUDGE TO RULE ON 10/27/03.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAYER, FRED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARZINI, ALYSSE $811.67 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $863.67, MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL WAS DENIED. (DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR, BUT SENT A REPRESENTATIVE TO ARGUE HER CLAIM) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $811.67 FILED BY THAYER, FRED AS TO DEFENDANT GARZINI, ALYSSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
